I certify that I, or a qualified non-physician practitioner working with me, had a face-to-face encounter with this patient on the date specified above relating to the primary reason the patient requires Home Health services. The following clinical conditions noted during the encounter support the patients home bound status, in that absences from the home require considerable and taxing effort, are infrequent, and/or of short duration, or are due to the need to receive health care: Unsteady gait/frequent falls/poor balance. Requires supportive devices to walk. Activity greatly limited due to weakness. Activity greatly limited due to pain. Clinical findings demonstrating the medical necessity for home health services include: Decline in patient condition due to hospitalization, requires skilled services. Patient has a wound that requires continued skilled care. Based on the above findings, I certify that this patient is homebound and needs intermittent skilled nursing care, physical therapy and/or speech therapy or continues to need occupational therapy. I have initiated the plan of care and this patient will be followed by a physician who will periodically review the plan of care. This order has been electronically signed.
